question: Which year from 2005-2010 has the highest total number of murders in Maryland? Your response should be in the format [Answer].
practical_motivation: A crime analyst is tracking which mid-2000s year had the highest number of reported murders across counties.

1.fact: Summing MURDER by YEAR across all jurisdictions for 2005-2010, 2007 has the highest total at 551.
1.subquestion: Which year from 2005-2010 has the highest total number of murders in Maryland? (Sum MURDER by YEAR across all jurisdictions; select the maximum.)

reasoning_chain: Node 1: Sum MURDER by YEAR (2005-2010) and select the maximum; the peak year is 2007.
